children.text: the term “court order” has the same meaning given in ;section 4044(4) of this title
the term “Fund” means the Foreign Service Retirement and Disability Fund maintained by the Secretary of the Treasury pursuant to ;section 4042 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: retirement deductions made from the basic pay of a participant under (or under section 204 of the Federal Employees’ Retirement Contribution Temporary Adjustment Act of 1983);section 4071e of this title

children.label: B
children.text: amounts deposited by a participant under to obtain credit under this System for prior civilian or military service; andsection 4071c of this title

children.label: i
children.text: if the service covered thereby aggregates 1 year or less; or

children.label: ii
children.text: for a fractional part of a month in the total service;

the term “normal cost” means the entry-age normal cost of the provisions of the System which relate to the Fund, computed by the Secretary of State in accordance with generally accepted actuarial practice and standards (using dynamic assumptions) and expressed as a level percentage of aggregate basic pay;
the term “participant” means a person who participates in the Foreign Service Pension System;

the term “pro rata share” in the case of any former spouse of any participant or former participant means the percentage which is equal to the percentage that (A) the number of years during which the former spouse was married to the participant during the service of the participant which is creditable under this subchapter is of (B) the total number of years of such service, disregarding extra credit under ;section 4057 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: is not a participant;

children.label: ii
children.text: is not performing service which is creditable service under ; andsection 4071c of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: has less than 5 years creditable service under ; andsection 4071c of this title

children.label: B
children.text: after , and before , becomes a participant performing service which is creditable service under ;December 31, 2012January 1, 2014section 4071c of this title

children.label: i

children.label: ii

children.label: B
children.text: after , becomes a participant performing service which is creditable service under ;December 31, 2013section 4071c of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the actuarial present value of all future benefits payable from the Fund under this part based on the service of participants or former participants, over

children.label: i
children.text: the actuarial present value of (I) deductions to be withheld from the future basic pay of participants pursuant to and (II) contributions for past civilian and military service;section 4071e of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the actuarial present value of future contributions to be made pursuant to ;section 4071f of this title

children.label: I
children.text: to the System, or

children.label: II
children.text: to the contributions made under the Federal Employees’ Retirement Contribution Temporary Adjustment Act of 1983 ( note); and5 U.S.C. 8331

children.label: iv
children.text: any other appropriate amount, as determined by the Secretary of State in accordance with generally accepted actuarial practices and principles;
the term “System” means the Foreign Service Pension System; and
the term “special agent” has the same meaning given in .section 4044(15) of this title
